reason: Verified that the agent can execute browser operations - specifically navigating to https://example.com and retrieving the page title "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing Super Agent interface with three agents in the sidebar
Clicked on "QA-20260423-035824-i29a" agent in the sidebar — Agent opened, displaying the chat interface and agent details
Clicked on the message input textbox — Input field became active and focused
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message successfully entered into the input field
Clicked the "Send message" button — Message was sent, agent status changed to "working", session was created with title "Browser Navigation and Page Title Retrieval"
Waited up to 180 seconds for response containing "Example Domain" — Agent completed the task in 8 seconds and returned the response: "The page title is "Example Domain"."

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" and took screenshot — Response clearly states the page title is "Example Domain", browser preview shows the Example Domain page, two tool call cards show "Open Browser" and "Browser Command $ get title" operations both completed successfully with checkmarks, agent status is now "idle"
